title: erodium cicutarium var. lebelii
intro: Erodium cicutarium var. lebelii, also known as the redstem storksbill or redstem geranium, is a plant species within the geranium family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, acting as an antiseptic, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Erodium cicutarium var. lebelii can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
